title: Admin & Project Coordinator – $2,500 to $3,200/month
description:
Location: 6 Harper Rd, Singapore 369674
Work Hours: 5.5 days/week (Mon–Fri: 9am–6pm, Sat: half day)

About the Role

Join PanelCraft, a growing house renovation company, as an Admin & Project Coordinator. You’ll support daily operations, handle project scheduling, and keep office administration running smoothly.

Responsibilities

  • Process orders, quotations & project documents
  • Schedule site measurements & installations
  • Liaise with contractors, suppliers & customers
  • Manage office admin: filing, calls, supplies & reception
  • Assist with HR admin & customer enquiries

Requirements

  • 1 year admin/project coordination experience preferred
  • Proficient in MS Office / Google Workspace
  • Organized, responsible & good communicator
  • Able to work 5.5 days/week (if available for 6 days, it’s a plus)

📩 Apply now: Send your resume to hiring@panelcraft.sg or Ryan via WhatsApp [81257108] with subject: Admin & Project Coordinator Application.

postedCompany.description:
Join PanelCraft - Innovative Wall Panel Renovation Services


Are you passionate about transforming living spaces with innovative renovation solutions? Do you want to be part of a dynamic team that is committed to delivering high-quality, sustainable products and services? If so, we invite you to join PanelCraft.


At PanelCraft, we are dedicated to providing homeowners with a revolutionary alternative to traditional wall coverings. Our WPC wall panels are easy to install, eco-friendly, and available in a range of stylish designs to suit any home décor. We take pride in our craftsmanship and attention to detail, and are committed to delivering exceptional customer service at every step of the way.


As we expand our business, we are looking for talented and motivated individuals to join our team. Whether you are a skilled carpenter, a sales and marketing expert, or a customer service professional, we offer a range of opportunities to grow and develop your career.

Benefits of working at PanelCraft:

  • Competitive salaries and benefits packages
  • Opportunities for career advancement and professional development
  • A supportive and collaborative work environment that values teamwork, creativity, and innovation
  • A commitment to sustainability and eco-friendliness in all aspects of our business

If you share our passion for innovation and excellence, we encourage you to apply for our open positions today. Together, we can build a better future for homeowners and the environment.
postedCompany.name: PANELCRAFT PTE. LTD.
